itinerary.title: Srinagar Houseboat Stay & Shikara Ride
itinerary.description: Arrive in Srinagar and check into a deluxe houseboat on Dal Lake. Enjoy a sunset Shikara ride, exploring floating gardens and markets.

itinerary.title: Mughal Gardens & Tulip Gardens Tour
itinerary.description: Visit the historic Mughal Gardens (Shalimar, Nishat, and Chashme Shahi). If traveling in spring, tour the famous Indira Gandhi Memorial Tulip Garden.

itinerary.title: Gulmarg Skiing & Gondola Cable Car Ride
itinerary.description: Drive to Gulmarg, a haven for skiers and nature lovers. Ride the Gondola cable car up to Apharwat Peak for breathtaking views of the Himalayas.

itinerary.title: Pahalgam Valley & Lidder River Excursion
itinerary.description: Drive to Pahalgam, the Valley of Shepherds. Walk along the Lidder River, visit Betaab Valley, and explore local pine forests.

itinerary.title: Sonmarg Alpine Scenery Trip
itinerary.description: Take a day trip to Sonmarg, the Meadow of Gold. Trek or ride a pony to the Thajiwas Glacier and enjoy alpine streams.

itinerary.title: Srinagar Departure
itinerary.description: Check out from Srinagar and transfer to the airport for your onward flight.

title: Kashmir: Magical Escape
description: Discover a true heaven on earth where snow-capped peaks mirror off tranquil alpine lakes. Stay in a deluxe houseboat on Srinagar's Dal Lake, glide past floating markets on a traditional shikara, and wander through historic Mughal Gardens. Explore the flower-filled alpine meadows and world-class ski slopes of Gulmarg and Pahalgam, and lose yourself in the pristine glaciers and mountain streams of Sonmarg. Kashmir's beauty promises memories that will last a lifetime.
highlights: Deluxe houseboat stay and sunset shikara ride on Srinagar's Dal Lake
Tour the historic Shalimar and Nishat Mughal Gardens and spring Tulip Gardens
Scenic Gondola cable car ride to high mountain peaks in Gulmarg
Explore Betaab Valley and walk along the pristine Lidder River in Pahalgam
Trek through the majestic alpine glaciers of Sonmarg, the Meadow of Gold
Immerse in warm Kashmiri hospitality and traditional local gastronomy
